title: psychotria ilocana
intro: Psychotria ilocana, also known as Ilocano wild coffee or mountain coffee, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving digestion, and acting as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Psychotria ilocana are often made into a tea or infused in hot water to harness its medicinal properties.
